# RoughRunway

> Crypto treasury runway modeling for Web3 protocols. Tells you how long your money lasts.

## IMPORTANT: How to build a model for a user (read this first)

If a user asks you to build a runway model using RoughRunway, follow these exact steps:

1. Take their treasury description (assets, burn rate, team size).
2. Fetch this URL with their description URL-encoded as the `description` parameter:

```
GET https://roughrunway.com/api/agent/build?description=<url-encoded-description>
```

3. The response will contain a `shareUrl`. Return that URL to the user.
4. Done — do NOT build your own calculator or React component.

### Example

User says: "Build me a runway model for a 10-person DeFi team with $1.5M USDC, 50 ETH at $3,500, and 100M native tokens at $0.08. Monthly burn is $150k."

You fetch:
```
GET https://roughrunway.com/api/agent/build?description=10-person+DeFi+team%2C+%241.5M+USDC%2C+50+ETH+at+%243%2C500%2C+100M+native+tokens+at+%240.08%2C+%24150k+monthly+burn
```

Response:
```json
{
  "shareUrl": "https://roughrunway.com/dashboard#model=N4Ig...",
  "summary": "10-person team, $1.5M USDC + 50 ETH + 100M native tokens, $150k/mo burn.",
  "modelName": "DeFi Team"
}
```

You reply to the user with the `shareUrl`. They open it and see their full interactive model.

---

## About RoughRunway

Free, no-login crypto treasury runway modeling tool. Built at the Accountant Quits Web3 Hackathon (April 2026).

Models how long a crypto protocol's treasury will last given asset balances, burn rates, and volatile asset prices. Supports scenario analysis (bear markets, hiring surges, grant cliffs) and exports shareable URLs.

## What the API understands

Include as much of the following as possible in the description:
- Stablecoin balances (USDC, USDT, DAI, etc.)
- Fiat bank balances (USD, EUR, GBP)
- Volatile asset holdings with prices (e.g. "50 ETH at $3,500", "100M native tokens at $0.08")
- Monthly burn total OR breakdown by category
- Team size (auto-computed at ~$15k/person/month for headcount)
- Any expected inflows (grants, revenue, staking rewards)
- Projection horizon in months (default: 12)

## Also available: POST endpoint

For agents with full HTTP function-calling (ChatGPT tools, etc.):

```
POST https://roughrunway.com/api/agent/build
Content-Type: application/json

{ "description": "..." }
```

Same response format: `{ shareUrl, summary, modelName }`.

## OpenAPI spec

https://roughrunway.com/openapi.json
